commands.summary: GenerationStampPublisher tests passed for PendingBarrier, Active, Retired, unstable read, max attempts, and hot-path active-only acceptance.

commands.command: P7D atomic forbidden scan for atomic<GenerationStamp>, atomic<GenerationTuple>, atomic<__int128>

tests_covered: Odd writer sequence produces unstable read
Reader attempts exactly max_attempt_count before unstable result
PendingBarrier is rejected for hot path
Active is accepted for hot path
Retired is rejected for hot path
allowed_operations_checked: Uses exactly three atomic<uint64_t> fields for sequence, tuple id, and encoded stream/state
forbidden_operations_checked: No off-by-one retry semantics detected by tests
No PendingBarrier or Retired hot-path acceptance
